description: I'd like to recommend everybody to use this Plugin. Customer Support is very good and I'm totally satisfied with the way of their dealing.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I'd like to recommend everybody to use this Plugin. Customer Support is very good and I'm totally satisfied with the way of their dealing.
cons: I didn't find any cons in this plugin, Thank you for the wonderful plugin.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with Support Board has been very positive. I have felt very well looked after by support and they are happy to answer any questions no matter how silly they may sound. I have never found any other software at this price-point with this level of features.
author: Christian D.
pros: What I like most about Support Board is the huge range of settings. There are so many features I am using some that I did not know I needed until I saw them. Being able to customise the chat widget to your exact taste and brand really helps aesthetically and improves the user experience overall. Being able to integrate Slack is brilliant and is a huge plus for our requirements.
cons: Auto-updates did not work for me first try. I was quickly assisted by customer support and they told me I needed to enable "PHP Zip function" in my cPanel so the auto-updates could work. This was disabled by default so not After doing this it was all fine and updates seamlessly.

review_title: The best for you and your visitors!
description: We needed a live chat system that's modern, when I went looking this checked every box I needed. I plan on buying more copies for more sites and will recommend this to everyone I know, so far loving the integrations as well as the features and hope you guys can get more things like desktop software, direct Joomla! plugins and improve what you've got.
author: Micah H.
pros: The amount of plugins and customization that this has... I've been using live support chats since the early noughts, this has gone above and beyond and at a price that is unbelievable for what it does.
cons: The best I could come up with a negative is there isn't a windows or Linux support system I can install and get notified when chat or tickets come in. But I bought this for Slack integration anyways.

author: Mario Humberto M.
pros: I would dare to say that it is one of the best codes that I have ever bought for my website. that's all you need for a chat. You can customize it by web section, see the user's position, automate, etc. You have practically for life what you pay per month on other platforms.
cons: All good. So far I haven't found anything negative.

author: Sebastiano C.
pros: It is very cheap and I pay only one time but it is professional and it works great
cons: I want more apps like LINE app in the marketplace

author: Patrick D.
pros: Easy to install and configure. Saving time with customer support. Powered with Artificial Intelligence and Slack integration.
cons: Now I have all that I need for my business.

description: I'll keep it short and sweet. With Support Board you buy a fantastic system that comes very strong with many features and offers everything you need. Price absolutely great! I am more than satisfied.
author: Frederik S.
pros: It's a really solid and well programmed software! Your free to choose between a cloud, php (server) or WordPress solution. And it's fully packed with a lot's of futures.
cons: Maybe the only thing what could be cool would be an extra implementation for email receives.

author: Mohammed A.
pros: It's a one-time payment and you own it forever, supports WhatsApp and Messenger/Instagram! it's very easy to understand and use by our employees! The PWA makes it easy to use on phones or on the go! And the best part was the customer support received!
cons: Nothing at all, it's a great alternative to Wazzup and similar software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very intuitive to setup, great design and UX for the end-users on our site.
author: Enrique G.
pros: Very intuitive to set up, great design and UX for the end-users on our WordPress and WooCommerce site.
cons: No cons were found during the testing of the software.

review_title: Good App With A Lots of Features
author: Maya R.
pros: This is a clean chat app i’ve ever seen. Easy to customize with a lot addons support.
cons: I hope it will bring more features on chat area.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
